title: Thelypteris prominula

intro: Thelypteris prominula, also known as the prominulous lady fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The prominulous lady fern has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Thelypteris prominula include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Thelypteris prominula is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tinctures and capsules, to take advantage of its therapeutic benefits.
